name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M12583 Large. This Medium CarryAll Dark handbag features a soft calfskin to create a chic, relaxed silhouette, adding a standout look to 2024 Spring/Summer runway styles. Polished metal hardware contrasts with a soft-touch pebbled texture. Ample space to hold various daily essentials, making it a perfect travel companion. 39 x 30 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)
